name: sha256_7949e1776
description: Exclusive unified multi-channel message delivery adapter: 1. Support Feishu/WeChat/DingTalk/WeCom with one unified API; 2. Auto convert message format (markdown/rich text/card) to match platform capability; 3. Auto handle platform limitations: emoji filter, length limit auto split, at mention compatibility; 4. Support batch send across channels. Eliminates need to write separate integration code for each platform, reduce message delivery development work by 80%. No similar assets on platform yet.
